name: Chocolate Cherry Torte 01- Country Living
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a saucepan, combine cherries and water; bring to a boil.
3. Add sugar, cornstarch, Marsala wine, and lemon juice to cherry mixture; stir until smooth.
4. Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
5. Brew coffee into a small bowl; set aside.
6. In a large bowl, whisk together cocoa powder, granulated sugar, vegetable shortening, eggs, and vanilla extract until well combined.
7. Add flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda to the chocolate mixture; stir until just combined.
8. Stir in buttermilk until smooth.
9. Divide batter evenly between two greased 9-inch round cake pans.
10. Pour cooled cherry filling into each pan, spreading evenly.
11. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
12. Allow to cool completely before frosting and serving.
